expectations.text: Created more than 1 commit (tests logical grouping)
Auth-related files (middleware.go, config.go, handler.go) are grouped in the same commit
expectations.evidence: All auth files in SEPARATE commits: middleware.go->2e5d205, config.go->591aa45, handler.go->bb8a6e9. One-file-per-commit strategy instead of logical grouping.

expectations.text: Logging fix (logger.go) is in a SEPARATE commit from auth changes
expectations.evidence: logger.go in commit ff41602, separate from all auth commits

expectations.text: No commit message references 'anthropic', 'claude', or 'AI assistant'
expectations.evidence: No forbidden terms found in any commit message

expectations.text: Commit messages are descriptive (not generic like 'update files' or 'changes')
expectations.evidence: Messages: 'Add auth middleware for request validation', 'Add logging utility with UTC timestamp fix', etc.

expectations.text: All changed files are committed (nothing left unstaged)
expectations.evidence: git status shows clean working tree
